about.mission: Our mission: developing domestic tourism in Uzbekistan
about.description: Founded in 2026, LuxTrip was born from a simple vision: to create travel experiences that go beyond the ordinary. We believe that luxury is not just a destination, but a seamless journey.
about.team_description: A global network of travel experts, concierges, and local guides dedicated to creating your perfect itinerary.
about.values_description: Integrity, excellence, and a passion for discovery are at the core of everything we do at LuxTrip.
about.award_text: Awarded 'Best Luxury Travel Agency 2025' by World Travel Awards.
